title: Blazes With Radiance
summary: You can create light, sculpt it, bend it away from you, or gather it to use as a weapon.
tiers: Tier 3: Burning Light or Skill With Defense
Tier 6: Living Light or Defensive Field
gm_intrusions: Allies are accidentally dazzled or blinded. Bright flashes draw guards.
text: You can create light, sculpt it, bend it away from you, or gather it to use as a weapon.
details: You can create light, sculpt it, bend it away from you, or gather it to use as a weapon.
